zh.lifeSummary: 當Irmengard vom Rhein於1200年出生時，她的父親Heinrich  V von Braunschweig28歲，母親Agnes von Hohenstaufen24歲。她於大約1220年與Hermann V. von Baden在德國爾特波格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1260年2月24日在德國爾特波格享年60歲，埋葬在巴登阿赤 巴登利希騰塔爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Irmengard vom Rhein于1200年出生时，她的父亲Heinrich  V von Braunschweig28岁，母亲Agnes von Hohenstaufen24岁。她于大约1220年与Hermann V. von Baden在德国爾特波格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1260年2月24日在德国爾特波格享年60岁，埋葬在巴登阿赤 巴登利希騰塔爾。

nameMeanings.name: vom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Korean and Chinese: variant of   Yum  .
Cambodian: written យ៉ុម, unexplained.

variants.name: Yum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyung, Young, Dong, Doo, Ho, Jung, Kyoung, Byoung, Chang, Chang Soon, Chang Yong, Chong, Choong, Chung Nam, Heung, Hyum, Jaehyun, Jin Suk, Kiho, Kum, Pyong, Sang Chul, Sang Soo, Seong.

Korean (Yŏm): there is only one Yŏm clan. It was originally known as the Yŏm family from Tanwŏn County (Kyŏnggi Province), but the name of this county was changed to P’aju County. The Yŏm family was very influential throughout the Koryŏ Kingdom until Yŏm Hŭng-bang, a powerful court official, was executed for treason by the Koryŏ King U (1374–87). The clan never recovered its former glory.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 任, based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Ren   1.

nameMeanings.name: Rhein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Arno, Elke, Erna, Helmut, Horst, Kurt.

topographic name for someone who lived by the Rhine river, Middle High German Rīn, which is first recorded in the Roman period in the form Rhenus; it may be derived from a Celtic element meaning ‘to flow’.

variants.name: Rhine
meanings: German: name from the common river name Rhin.

variants.name: Rhyne
meanings: Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Rhyn: topographic name for someone living on the Rhine river, Middle High German Rīn.
Americanized form of German   Rhein   or   Rein  , or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Irmengard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Irmengard vom Rhein was born in 1200, her father, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, was 28 and her mother, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, was 24. She married Hermann V. von Baden about 1220, in Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 February 1260, in Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 60, and was buried in Lichtental, Amt Baden, Baden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irmengard vom Rhein est née en 1200, son père, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Hermann V. von Baden environ 1220, à Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 février 1260, à Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Lichtental, Amt Baden, Baden.

de.lifeSummary: Als Irmengard vom Rhein 1200 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich  V von Braunschweig 28 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Hohenstaufen 24. Sie hat um 1220 in Württemberg, Deutschland Hermann V. von Baden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Februar 1260 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Lichtental, Amt Baden, Baden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irmengard vom Rhein è nata il nel 1200, sua padre, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Hermann V. von Baden circa 1220, nel Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 febbraio 1260, nel Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Lichtental, Amt Baden, Baden.

ja.lifeSummary: Irmengard vom Rheinが1200年に生まれた時，父Heinrich  V von Braunschweigは28歳，母Agnes von Hohenstaufenは24歳であった。約1220年にドイツウuルッテンバーグでHermann V. von Badenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1260年2月24日にドイツウuルッテンバーグで60歳で死去し，バデンアムト バデンリチテンタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Irmengard vom Rhein(이)가 1200년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich  V von Braunschweig(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Hohenstaufen(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 독일 wu르테버그에서 Hermann V. von Baden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 2월 24일 독일 wu르테버그에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 바든 아트 바든 리트탤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Irmengard vom Rhein nasceu em 1200, seu pai, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Hermann V. von Baden aproximadamente 1220, em Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1260, em Württemberg, Alemanha, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Lichtental, Amt Baden, Baden.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Irmengard vom Rhein родилась в 1200 г., её отцу по имени Heinrich  V von Braunschweig было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Hohenstaufen, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hermann V. von Baden около 1220 г. в местности вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 февраля 1260 г. в местности вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности личтенталь, амт баден, баден.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Irmengard vom Rhein nació en 1200, su papá, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Hermann V. von Baden aproximadamente 1220, en Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1260, en Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Lichtental, Amt Baden, Baden.
